ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Function of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the associated gene */,
  "location" TEXT /* Genomic location of the variant */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the variant (e.g., SNP, INDEL) */,
  "variant_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the variant (e.g., missense, frameshift) */,
  "variant_annotation_count" INTEGER /* Count of variant annotations */,
  "clinical_annotation_count" INTEGER /* Count of clinical annotations */,
  "level_1_2_clinical_annotation_count" INTEGER /* Count of level 1/2 clinical annotations */,
  "guideline_annotation_count" INTEGER /* Count of guideline annotations */,
  "label_annotation_count" INTEGER /* Count of label annotations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the variant */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_versions_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., functional, pathogenic) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the clinical annotation */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the clinical annotation (e.g., disease association, treatment response) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the clinical annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the clinical annotation was made */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the clinical annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_1_2_clinical_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the level 1/2 clinical annotation */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the level 1/2 clinical annotation (e.g., high confidence, confirmed) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the level 1/2 clinical annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the level 1/2 clinical annotation was made */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the level 1/2 clinical annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_1_2_clinical_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_1_2_clinical_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guideline_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the guideline annotation */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant being annotated */,
  "guideline_id" TEXT /* ID of the guideline */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the guideline annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the guideline annotation was made */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the guideline annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guideline_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guideline_annotations_guideline_id FOREIGN KEY ("guideline_id") REFERENCES guidelines ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guideline_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the label annotation */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant being annotated */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the annotation (e.g., important, rare) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the label annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the label annotation was made */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the label annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the synonym */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant the synonym belongs to */,
  "synonym_value" TEXT /* Value of the synonym */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the clinical trial */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant associated with the trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the publication */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the variant associated with the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the author is associated with */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the guideline */,
  "guideline_name" TEXT /* Name of the guideline */,
  "guideline_description" TEXT /* Description of the guideline */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the guideline was published */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the guideline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id")
)
